license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ygjftun
title: UC Davis - Creatinine Protocol
author: Peter Havel

steps_raw.instruction: Add 3 µl of calibrator and sample to each well.
Add 135 µl of R1 to each well. Incubate at 37°C for 5 minutes. Read at 550 nm.
Add 45 µl of R2 to each well. Incubate at 37°C for 5 minutes. Read at 550 nm.
Subtract blank readings from final readings. The assay will be linear so the unknown samples can be calculated as (Sample Absorbance ÷ Calibrator Absorbance) × Calibrator Concentration.
